Title: Open-Source ML Pipeline Framework
Description: Created and maintain an open-source Python library for building reproducible ML pipelines. The framework simplifies model training, evaluation, and deployment with built-in support for experiment tracking and model versioning. Used by over 500 organizations. Technologies: Python, Docker, Kubernetes.

Title: Real-Time Fraud Detection System
Description: Architected and deployed real-time fraud detection system processing millions of transactions daily. Implemented ensemble of ML models with sub-100ms latency. Reduced fraud by 45% while minimizing false positives. Technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Apache Kafka, Redis.
